title: File:Flickr - Official U.S. Navy Imagery - Singer Katy Perry performs at the Fleet Week New York Block Party for Sailors and Marines..jpg
creator: Official Navy Page from United States of America Mass Communication Specialist 2nd Class (AW/SW) Gretchen Albrecht/U.S. Navy
credit: Singer Katy Perry performs at the Fleet Week New York Block Party for Sailors and Marines.
description: NEW YORK (May 23, 2012) Singer Katy Perry performs at the Fleet Week New York Block Party for Sailors and Marines. Fleet Week New York 2012 marks the 25th year the city has celebrated the nation's sea services. This year, the seven-day event coincides with the commemoration of the Bicentennial of the War of 1812 and will host more than 6,000 service-members from the Navy, Marine Corps and Coast Guard team in addition to coalition ships from around the world. (U.S. Navy photo by Mass Communication Specialist Petty Officer 2nd Class Gretchen Albrecht/Released) 120523-N-NR998-286
